trivia_bullets.text: "Those whose lives were uninspired are doomed to the wretched tedium of Phylias in death." [Scryfall]. Phylias is the uppermost layer of the Theros Underworld, reserved for souls whose mortal lives were unremarkable — the Theran analogue of the Greek Fields of Asphodel. Residents of Phylias perform repetitive tasks in featureless structures [WebSearch snippet: MTG Wiki: Underworld].
sources: MTG Wiki: Underworld, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Dreadful Apathy is a white Aura that immobilizes enchanted creatures and can exile them for a mana investment. On Theros, white mana governs civic order and the afterlife's administrative tiers — Phylias sits at the intersection of both, making white the fitting color for this effect [Scryfall].

Legal in Pauper and PauperCommander, Dreadful Apathy is a budget Answer in white that trades instant-speed removal for the flexibility of a repeatable exile activation. EDHREC rank 19653 reflects limited Commander demand due to competition from cheaper white removal [Scryfall, EDHREC].
